mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user_info (id, login_id, password, email, role, login_failure_count, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{form.id}, #{form.loginId}, #{form.password}, #{form.email}, #{form.role},#{form.loginFailureCount}, #{form.isDeleted},#{form.createdAt},#{form.updatedAt});
